title: SpaIM: Single-cell Spatial Transcriptomics Imputation via Style Transfer.
author: Li B Tang Z Budhkar A Liu X Zhang T Yang B Su J Song Q
content: S-EPMC11838188 PMC11838188 SpaIM: Single-cell Spatial Transcriptomics Imputation via Style Transfer.
